MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by John Adekunjo.
Attorney Bill Ford appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Sanmarlow Brown is present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-28-2013 is vacated.
